data: Gourmet Grilled Cheese: Butter the outer sides of 2 thick slices of sourdough bread. Layer 2 slices of sharp cheddar, 2 slices of gruyere cheese, and 3 slices of crispy bacon inside. Grill in a skillet over medium-low heat for 5 minutes per side, pressing gently, until bread is deeply golden and cheese is fully melted.
